name: U.A. sports festival….. with Sarah
description:
Oh, Sarah is here. WELL, you gotta deal with this pick me girl from papa ren, but you can do this, right?

BE A TEACHER, STUDENT, A ONLOOKERS

OR SOME RANDOM WEIRDO

Let me clarify I have permission from papa ren to use Sarah

LOVE TO MY STALKERS!!!

Lemme know if I missed a character

This has:

1-A

1-B

Mei hatsume

Beginning of the anime pro heroes (with hawks at 11)

U.A. staff

creator: Alistor099
